parent_sdk_catalog: not modified; python/nmr_extract/_catalog.py remains the producer-SDK home for NPY ArraySpec decisions

source_sets.all: sum over all McConnell literature-present bond sources in the row
source_sets.producer_valid: sum over literature-present bond sources with mc_source_is_self_or_bonded == 0

present_column.name: mc_lit_kernel_present
present_column.description: 1 when the per-source literature-scaled McConnell PCS tensor is emitted

t0_column.name: mc_lit_T0
t0_column.description: trace audit channel for the per-source literature-scaled PCS tensor

t2_columns.description: per-source literature-scaled McConnell PCS T2 tensor in the target local frame

present_column.name: mc_lit_kernel_present
present_column.description: 1 when at least one all-source literature-scaled McConnell tensor contributes

t0_column.name: mc_lit_T0
t0_column.description: all-source sum of source mc_lit_T0 values

t2_columns.description: all-source sum of source mc_lit_T2_local_* values

present_column.name: mc_lit_valid_kernel_present
present_column.description: 1 when at least one producer-valid literature-scaled McConnell tensor contributes

t0_column.name: mc_lit_T0_valid
t0_column.description: producer-valid sum of source mc_lit_T0 values

t2_columns.description: producer-valid sum of source mc_lit_T2_local_* values
